title: ScholomanceFormulaProposal
description: Wraps a proposed formula with AI metadata and confidence targets

rationale.description: Textual justification for why this formula matches the PDR intent

confidence.description: Self-assessed confidence of the AI agent

reviewRequired.description: Flag to mark if the proposal contains creative violence or high risk

sourceIntentHash.description: Trace hash of the source PDR text block

evalSuiteId.description: Identifier of the QA test suite this proposal was verified against

role.description: Semantic rendering target role (e.g. shrine.altar, sigil.capsule)

material.description: Asset material look (e.g. stone, glass, aura, wood, paper)
